{
  Item1:
/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Range
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class MyData final {


    static constexpr std::array<uint8_t, 4> range_starts = {
        42, 62, 80, 100
    };

    static constexpr std::array<uint8_t, 4> range_ends = {
        42, 62, 80, 100
    };
public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const uint8_t key) noexcept {

        for (size_t i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
            if (key >= range_starts[i] && key <= range_ends[i])
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 4;
    static constexpr uint8_t min_key = 42;
    static constexpr uint8_t max_key = 100;
};
,
  Item2: 
}
